name: BB:FalsePositive: LDAP Server False Positive Categories
notes: Edit this BB to define all the false positive categories that occur to or from LDAP servers that are defined in the BB:HostDefinition: LDAP Servers building block.
bb_references: BB:FalsePositive: LDAP Server False Positive Categories on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: LDAP Servers, BB:HostReference: LDAP Servers
when the event category for the event is one of the following User Defined.Custom User 9
